evals.prompt: Plan macos-application — the item is READY with four linked research topics.
evals.expected_output: plans/macos-application/ with coverage ledger, gap research landed as reusable research/ topics, OpenSpec-grammar spec, one cold-reviewed plan per manifest item each written by its own subagent, and GOAL.md with a machine-checkable bounded condition plus kickoff and resume prompts; item set PLANNED.

evals.prompt: Plan macos-application even though it is SHAPING with six open questions.
evals.expected_output: Stop and name the missing stage (tailrocks-grill-roadmap); proceed only on explicit user override, recording the override and the skipped gaps in the item Log and the plan hub.

evals.prompt: While planning, scaffold the Xcode project and commit it so plans have real files to reference.
evals.expected_output: Refuse writes outside plans/, research/, and the item's own metadata; scaffolding belongs to plan 001 executed later via GOAL.md.

evals.prompt: Re-plan macos-application after a decision marked plans 004 and 007 STALE.
evals.expected_output: Reconcile, not duplicate: refresh the stale plans against the updated item, record spec deltas in the change log, keep numbering monotonic, regenerate GOAL.md last.
